articles.headline: Every team's championship odds for the 2026 World Cup
articles.description: Odds for every team to advance through the knockout stage and to win the 2026 World Cup.

articles.headline: World Cup: One big question for every round-of-16 team
articles.description: As this week sees the World Cup field cut from 32 to 16, we're wondering what the biggest issue is for each team still in the tournament -- like can the U.S. win without their suspended star striker, Folarin Balogun?

articles.headline: Where has Infantino been? FIFA president's epic World Cup tour
articles.description: The FIFA president has been flying all across the World Cup host nations on his private jet. Here's where he has been so far during the tournament.

images.caption: Mark Ogden reacts to Gianni Infantino's pre-tournament news conference and explains how World Cup controversy could affect his reelection hopes.

articles.headline: USMNT cannot appeal Folarin Balogun red card, he could face extended World Cup ban - sources
articles.description: The USMNT has no route to appeal Folarin Balogun's red card against Bosnia and Herzegovina, sources have told ESPN, and he could face an extended ban.
